mapper.select: SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contract c INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = c.recruitment_id WHERE c.freelancer_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status <> 'CANCELLED' ) AS in_progress_contract_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contract c INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = c.recruitment_id WHERE c.freelancer_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'PROPOSAL' AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status <> 'CANCELLED' ) AS received_proposal_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment_application ra INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = ra.recruitment_id WHERE ra.applicant_email = #{email} AND ra.status <> 'CANCELLED' AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status <> 'CANCELLED' ) AS applied_recruitment_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM portfolio p WHERE p.email = #{email} AND p.is_deleted = 0 ) AS portfolio_count

SELECT c.contract_id, c.recruitment_id, r.title, company.company_name, c.company_email, cd.contract_end_date AS deadline, c.status FROM contract c INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = c.recruitment_id INNER JOIN company ON company.email = c.company_email LEFT JOIN contract_document cd ON cd.contract_id = c.contract_id WHERE c.freelancer_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
ORDER BY COALESCE(cd.confirmed_at, cd.contract_written_at) DESC, c.contract_id DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT c.contract_id, c.recruitment_id, r.title, company.company_name, c.company_email, COALESCE(proposal_notification.proposed_at, c.created_at) AS proposed_at, c.status FROM contract c INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = c.recruitment_id INNER JOIN company ON company.email = c.company_email LEFT JOIN ( SELECT receiver_email, target_id, MAX(created_at) AS proposed_at FROM notification WHERE type = 'PROPOSAL' GROUP BY receiver_email, target_id ) proposal_notification ON proposal_notification.receiver_email = c.freelancer_email AND proposal_notification.target_id = c.contract_id WHERE c.freelancer_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'PROPOSAL'
ORDER BY COALESCE(proposal_notification.proposed_at, c.created_at) DESC, c.contract_id DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT ra.application_id, ra.recruitment_id, r.title, company.company_name, ra.applied_at, ra.status FROM recruitment_application ra INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = ra.recruitment_id INNER JOIN company ON company.email = r.company_email WHERE ra.applicant_email = #{email} AND ra.status <> 'CANCELLED'
ORDER BY ra.applied_at DESC, ra.application_id DESC LIMIT 2
SELECT p.portfolio_id, p.title, p.summary, p.category, p.updated_at, p.is_public FROM portfolio p WHERE p.email = #{email} AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC, p.portfolio_id DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contract c INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = c.recruitment_id WHERE c.company_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status <> 'CANCELLED' ) AS in_progress_contract_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment_application ra INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = ra.recruitment_id WHERE r.company_email = #{email} AND ra.status <> 'CANCELLED' AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status <> 'CANCELLED' ) AS received_application_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recruitment r WHERE r.company_email = #{email} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status <> 'CANCELLED' ) AS recruitment_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contract c INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = c.recruitment_id WHERE c.company_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'WAITING' AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status <> 'CANCELLED' ) AS proposed_talent_count

SELECT c.contract_id, c.recruitment_id, r.title, freelancer.name AS freelancer_name, c.freelancer_email, cd.contract_end_date AS deadline, c.status FROM contract c INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = c.recruitment_id INNER JOIN user freelancer ON freelancer.email = c.freelancer_email LEFT JOIN contract_document cd ON cd.contract_id = c.contract_id WHERE c.company_email = #{email} AND c.status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
ORDER BY COALESCE(cd.confirmed_at, cd.contract_written_at) DESC, c.contract_id DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT ra.application_id, ra.recruitment_id, r.title AS recruitment_title, applicant.name AS applicant_name, ra.applicant_email, applicant.job_category, ra.applied_at, ra.status FROM recruitment_application ra INNER JOIN recruitment r ON r.recruitment_id = ra.recruitment_id INNER JOIN user applicant ON applicant.email = ra.applicant_email WHERE r.company_email = #{email} AND ra.status <> 'CANCELLED'
ORDER BY ra.applied_at DESC, ra.application_id DESC LIMIT 2

SELECT r.recruitment_id, r.title, r.created_at, COUNT(CASE WHEN ra.status <> 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS applicant_count, r.status FROM recruitment r LEFT JOIN recruitment_application ra ON ra.recruitment_id = r.recruitment_id WHERE r.company_email = #{email} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status <> 'CANCELLED' GROUP BY r.recruitment_id, r.title, r.created_at, r.status ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.recruitment_id DESC LIMIT 2
